steps.title: Find the shown slope
steps.content:
From the graph, line $k$ passes through $(-6,0)$ and $(0,-5)$. Its slope is
$$
m_k=\frac{-5-0}{0-(-6)}=-\frac{5}{6}
$$

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals: $$ m_j=-\frac{1}{-\frac{5}{6}}=\frac{6}{5} $$ The answer is 1.2.
